message:
✨ Add Node Offline Detection to PWA widget (#524)

- Add Node Offline Detection with count and status
- Change grid to 3x2 layout for 6 stats
- Show GPU allocation as "allocated/total" format
- Rename to "KubeStellar Console" throughout
- Replace Settings link with "Open Full Dashboard" button
- Add total nodes count with ready status

Stats now shown:
- Clusters (healthy count)
- GPUs (allocated/total)
- Nodes Offline (needs attention indicator)
- Pod Issues (critical count)
- Nodes (ready count)
- Status (overall health)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
